visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a female creator standing in a large warehouse-style supermarket environment. She is wearing a grey bucket hat and a navy blue off-the-shoulder top, smiling brightly while giving two thumbs up to the camera. Massive wooden pallets stacked with hundreds of clear plastic bags containing bagels are piled high behind and in front of her. The lighting is bright and clinical, typical of a large-scale retail interior. (2) The scene cuts to the creator picking up a specific bag of cheese bagels. She holds the bag toward the lens, her expression shifting to one of high excitement with an open-mouthed smile. She points and gestures toward the contents of the bag. In the blurred background, other shoppers and warehouse metal shelving are visible. Handheld camera movement creates a slight shakiness, typical of a personal vlog style. (3) A close-up shot focuses on a single bagel inside its plastic packaging, showing the melted orange cheese topping in detail. The camera cuts back to the creator who is now making a 'V' sign with her fingers while continuing to hold the bag. She points at the bagels again to emphasize their value. The background remains the bustling interior of the warehouse store. (4) The final sequence consists of quick cuts showing different bagel varieties, such as cinnamon raisin and plain, arranged in rows on the pallets. The creator is seen handling the bags and showing a price sign. Bright yellow and white text graphics overlay the center of the frame throughout these transitions to highlight key information about the product and pricing.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 新的制度. 貝果單賣. 一顆只要20元. (2) [Subtitle]: 好的制度又一個. (3) [Subtitle]: 就是貝果. (4) [Variety]: 單包購買. (5) [Subtitle]: 以前都要雙包購買. (6) [Subtitle]: 現在可以單包. (7) [Variety]: 超值得. (8) [Subtitle]: 一個貝果是20塊. (9) [Subtitle]: 你看這起司口味. [Variety]: 好划算喔. (10) [Subtitle]: 有一整片起司. (11) [Subtitle]: 起司一片不就10塊. (12) [Subtitle]: 所以麵包才10塊. (13) [Subtitle]: 肉桂葡萄. (14) [Subtitle]: 跟原味. (15) [Subtitle]: 冰冷凍都可以. (16) [Subtitle]: 放一個月. (17) [Subtitle]: 然後可以用蒸的.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground, with approximately 4 other shoppers partially visible and blurred in the background warehouse aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a grey patterned bucket hat, a navy blue off-the-shoulder ruffled blouse, and blue denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high ceilings, industrial metal shelving, and large wooden pallets stacked with bulk quantities of baked goods, specifically bagels in plastic bags.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An energetic female voice begins speaking quickly in Mandarin Chinese with a cheerful, high-pitched prosody. Background music starts immediately, featuring a jaunty acoustic guitar melody and a steady drum beat in a bright major key. The overall acoustic environment suggests an indoor field recording with a very slight room resonance. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect added in post-production triggers exactly as the text graphic '單包購買' appears on screen. The narrator's voice maintains high arousal and positive valence, with frequent upward pitch inflections to denote excitement. The music remains steady in volume beneath the voice. (3) The rhythmic rustling of plastic bags is clearly audible as the creator handles the bagel packages. A second digital 'pop' or 'twinkle' SFX marks the appearance of promotional text. The speaker's delivery becomes even more emphatic as she discusses the pricing details. (4) The female narrator's voice remains the dominant signal, exhibiting clear articulation and a friendly, conversational tone. The BGM provides continuous rhythmic support without any pauses. The acoustic texture is bright and dense, reflecting the fast-paced editing style of the video content. (5) The final phase features a quick series of statements about food storage, with the voice maintaining its energetic pace until the very end. The BGM concludes with the voice as the track is cut cleanly. There are no significant background noises or technical distortions present in the master track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of Policy Change -> Price Analysis -> Variety Showcase -> Storage Advice
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform Costco members in Taiwan about a significant change in the bagel purchasing policy—allowing single bag purchases—and to highlight the high value and variety of the available products through an enthusiastic personal review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be user-generated shopping advice rather than a paid advertisement, though it features a specific retail brand prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-energy social media editing style with frequent text overlays and upbeat music to deliver rapid consumer news to a specific regional audience.
